DashboardPanelFX - Class in nonprofitbookkeeping.ui.panels
A JavaFX BorderPane that serves as the main dashboard for displaying journal transactions.

Constructs a new DashboardPanelFX.
DashboardPanelFX.DashboardListener - Class in nonprofitbookkeeping.ui.panels
A CurrentCompany.CompanyChangeListener implementation that listens for changes in the CurrentCompany (e.g., when a company file is opened or closed).

DATE_RANGE_MANDATORY_START - Enum constant in enum class nonprofitbookkeeping.ui.helpers.DateSelectionMode
Represents a date range where both the start date and end date are mandatory.
DATE_RANGE_OPTIONAL_START - Enum constant in enum class nonprofitbookkeeping.ui.helpers.DateSelectionMode
Represents a date range where the end date is mandatory, but the start date is optional.
dateAwarded - Variable in class nonprofitbookkeeping.model.Grant
The date when the grant was awarded, typically in a string format (e.g., "YYYY-MM-DD").

DemoCompanySeeder - Class in nonprofitbookkeeping.service
Populates a Company aggregate with a small but realistic chart of accounts and a handful of ledger transactions so that freshly created databases have something to explore.
